title: DotNetMetadataExtraction
description: Structured metadata extracted from a .NET assembly via dnfile

public_key_token.description: 8-byte token as 16-char hex string, derived via SHA-1 of full public key (last 8 bytes reversed)

target_framework.description: null means 'not extracted' (CustomAttribute blob parsing deferred), NOT 'absent'

referenced_assemblies.description: Assemblies referenced via the AssemblyRef metadata table

escape_surface.description: True if assembly name matches an escape-marker prefix (InteropServices, Reflection.Emit, Diagnostics.Process). NOTE: this per-ref flag alone does NOT determine the top-level has_escape_surface flag.

public_type_surface.description: Public types (classes, interfaces) defined in the assembly

pinvoke_surface.description: P/Invoke declarations bridging managed code to native DLLs

resource_streams.description: Names of manifest resources embedded in the assembly

has_escape_surface.description: True if the assembly can escape the CLR sandbox. Derived from TWO sources: (1) AssemblyRef names matching escape-marker prefixes, (2) TypeRef namespaces matching escape-marker prefixes. Either source being True sets this True. A False on all per-AssemblyRef escape_surface flags does NOT guarantee this is False — TypeRef namespaces can independently trigger it.
